mapper.select: SELECT * FROM proposition WHERE annotation_id = #{annotationId} ORDER BY sequence_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO proposition(annotation_id, display_id, sequence_no, start_pos, end_pos, selected_text, label_l1, label_l2, label_path) VALUES (#{annotationId}, #{displayId}, #{sequenceNo}, #{startPos}, #{endPos}, #{selectedText}, #{labelL1}, #{labelL2}, #{labelPath})
